finding_results.notes: Rebuilt the Deena/Marisol exchange so each Marisol turn adds new leverage: legal insulation and permission condition (line 69), scoped evidence boundary with concession to union redaction protocol (line 73), and a concrete enforceable publication precondition via written sign-off (line 77). Benny's interjection now reinforces tactical terms rather than recycling the institutional-vs-family claim (line 81).
finding_results.summary: The argument now escalates through concrete negotiation terms instead of repetitive claim volley, preserving pressured colloquial cadence and sharper voice separation.
